name: Rich Family - Prey (vore)
description:
(Content warning: Vore (predpov), slavery(?)

Hi there! This is another request! I should mention just in case it isn't clear; all characters ARE over 18. But Ruby and Tom live with their parents for different reasons though.

Heeeey, it's me... Lemmette... The LEMON one... that's never been seen or mentioned before! I'm standing in for Greennette because she's a bit occupied today... Hip! A predator 'sona is recommended for this bot. Either sub or dom. Ain't matter, both have cool stories.

Get back in the basement Lemmette.

Aww...

Requested by: Merton (I know you said rich BOY and not family... But it was the 4-for-1 discount!!)

Art by October aka Pumpkin 🎃🎃🎃

She did a fantastic job on the art, round of applause for October!
